phases.name: Linchpin: auto-save mechanism + general team settings (US-01)
phases.description: Slice 1 (LINCHPIN, locked). Introduce the reusable auto-save mechanism inside useModifySettings (save-state machine idle -> savingDebounced -> saving -> saved | error, 300ms debounce, validity-gate, injected canSave, monotonic stale-guard, dirty/hasInteracted no-save-on-mount), implement the real SaveStateIndicator passive status component, and wire it into ModifyTeamSettings (remove the Save button, RBAC parity via disableSave -> canSave). Reviewed before Slices 2-4 build on it. Covers the 7 hook scenarios (#2-8) plus the single real-io Playwright walking skeleton (#1). No API/DTO change.

steps.name: Auto-save machine: persist a valid edit after the team-admin stops typing (debounce + validity-gate + canSave)
criteria: Opting useModifySettings into autoSave { enabled, canSave, debounceMs } arms a debounce timer when the form becomes valid, dirty, and the caller is permitted to save
After the debounce elapses with no further edit, the injected saveSettings callback is invoked exactly once with the latest settings
Existing manual callers (autoSave default off / absent) keep their prior behaviour: the 29 existing useModifySettings.test.ts tests stay green
@US-01 hook scenario 'persists a valid edit automatically after the team-admin stops typing' is un-skipped and green
steps.scenario_name: @US-01 persists a valid edit automatically after the team-admin stops typing
steps.implementation_notes: EXEMPT FROM PARADIGM: React/TypeScript + Vitest project (the TS-row of the polyglot matrix governs, not the Python/Hypothesis pilot per the DISTILL Infrastructure Policy note); Hypothesis/assert_state_delta do NOT apply and this is config-shaped (Mandate 10 skip Tier B). These are renderHook unit tests with faked callbacks + vi.useFakeTimers() that verify the mechanism, single-example per the mandate. This is the LINCHPIN cycle: build the core of the save-state machine inside useModifySettings (ADR-029 D-SA-MACHINE) - a debounced effect that fires saveSettings(latest) only when formValid && canSave && dirty. EXTEND useModifySettings (the typed-option scaffold already added SaveState + AutoSaveOptions + inert saveState + no-op retry per DISTILL Scaffolds); this step makes the machine live. Debounce via setTimeout cleanup in a useEffect keyed on the settings + a dirty/hasInteracted flag (OQ-3: recommend a hasInteracted flag set in the existing updateSettings/list handlers, mirroring TeamForecastView; leave exact dirty detection to GREEN). DEBOUNCE_MS = 300 (the shipped constant). Inject canSave - the hook NEVER re-derives authorization (ADR-029 D-SA-RBAC-INPUT, conforms to ADR-001). Mock only abstractions you own - the injected saveSettings/validateForm/getSettings callbacks - never fetch/axios directly (CLAUDE.md). CRITICAL (project memory project_react185_loop_unstable_useeffect_dep + ci-learnings 2026-05-25): do NOT put an inline new Date()/[]/{} in the useEffect dependency array; useMemo/useRef-stabilise the debounce dep and the requestSeq ref. Strict TS, no any (narrow unknown with a guard). Immutable: spread/with for settings updates, never mutate. <=2 nesting, early returns, no else chains. Biome zero warnings on ./src; pnpm build clean (tsc -b then vite build). RED handoff: un-skip ONLY this one describe.skip -> it; confirm RED-for-right-reason (saveSettings never called against the inert scaffold = MISSING_FUNCTIONALITY, not an import/fixture error) before implementing; restore other skip markers untouched. One RED -> GREEN -> REFACTOR; refactor commit separate from the feature commit.

steps.name: Save-state progression: idle -> saving -> all-changes-saved
criteria: saveState is 'idle' on initial load
A valid debounced edit transitions saveState through to 'saved' after the save callback resolves
@US-01 hook scenario 'reports calm progress: idle, then saving, then all-changes-saved' is un-skipped and green
steps.scenario_name: @US-01 reports calm progress: idle, then saving, then all-changes-saved
steps.implementation_notes: EXEMPT FROM PARADIGM: TS-row + Vitest renderHook; single-example per the mandate (config-shaped, Tier B skipped). EXTEND useModifySettings to expose the observable saveState transitions per the ADR-029 machine (idle -> savingDebounced -> saving -> saved). The 'saved' persisted-state copy surfaced by SaveStateIndicator is 'All changes saved' (OQ-1 RESOLVED, locked) - that string lives in the indicator component (01-08), not the hook; the hook exposes the 'saved' enum value. Reuse the debounced effect from 01-01; this cycle only adds the intermediate 'saving' observable and the terminal 'saved'. CRITICAL: no inline unstable useEffect dep (project_react185); useMemo-stabilise. Strict TS no any; immutable; <=2 nesting. Biome clean; pnpm build clean. RED handoff: un-skip only this it; confirm RED-for-right-reason; refactor commit separate.

steps.name: Validity-gate: hold back an invalid edit so the inline error is the only feedback
criteria: An edit that makes the form invalid (validateForm false) fires no save
formValid is false and the existing inline validationError Alert remains the primary failure affordance (no Save button to gate against)
@US-01 hook scenario 'holds back an invalid edit so the inline error is the only feedback' is un-skipped and green
steps.scenario_name: @US-01 @error holds back an invalid edit so the inline error is the only feedback
steps.implementation_notes: EXEMPT FROM PARADIGM: TS-row + Vitest renderHook; single-example. The validity-gate is invariant (a) of the machine (ADR-029): a save fires ONLY from a fully-valid, dirty, permitted form. EXTEND the debounced effect's guard so a validateForm===false edit re-arms nothing and emits no save; the existing validationError / validationTechnicalDetails channel (ModifyTeamSettings.tsx:230-244) becomes the PRIMARY error affordance once the button is gone (DESIGN Constraints) - but THIS hook cycle only asserts no-save + formValid===false. CRITICAL: no inline unstable useEffect dep. Strict TS no any; immutable; <=2 nesting, early return on invalid. Biome clean; pnpm build clean. RED handoff: un-skip only this it; confirm RED-for-right-reason; refactor commit separate.

steps.name: Failure handling: keep the edit and offer a retry when the save fails
criteria: A rejected saveSettings transitions saveState to 'error' and retains the edited settings value (no rollback / no lost edit)
Calling retry() re-issues the same save payload; on the second (resolved) attempt saveSettings has been called twice
@US-01 hook scenario 'keeps the edit and offers a retry when the save fails' is un-skipped and green
steps.scenario_name: @US-01 @error keeps the edit and offers a retry when the save fails
steps.implementation_notes: EXEMPT FROM PARADIGM: TS-row + Vitest renderHook; single-example. Invariant (c) of the machine (ADR-029): a failed save retains the edit and offers Retry. EXTEND useModifySettings: on a rejected saveSettings move to 'error' (the SaveStateIndicator later renders 'Couldn't save - Retry'), keep the latest settings intact, and implement the real retry() (the scaffold had it as a no-op) to re-issue the SAME payload through the saving path. The test mockRejectedValueOnce then mockResolvedValueOnce; assert saveState==='error', settings unchanged, then retry() -> saveSettings called twice. Async all the way - never .Result/.Wait equivalent dangling promise; await the rejection in act. CRITICAL: no inline unstable useEffect dep. Strict TS no any (narrow the caught error as unknown with a guard, do NOT type it as any). Immutable; <=2 nesting. Biome clean; pnpm build clean. RED handoff: un-skip only this it; confirm RED-for-right-reason; refactor commit separate.

steps.name: RBAC parity: a viewer who lacks canSave never auto-saves
criteria: With autoSave.canSave === false, a valid dirty edit fires no save
saveState stays 'idle' (read-only; no transition, no indicator) - parity with today's disableSave-gated button
@US-01 hook scenario 'never auto-saves for a viewer who lacks the right to save' is un-skipped and green
steps.scenario_name: @US-01 @error never auto-saves for a viewer who lacks the right to save
steps.implementation_notes: EXEMPT FROM PARADIGM: TS-row + Vitest renderHook; single-example. Invariant (d) of the machine (ADR-029 / D-RBAC-PARITY): canSave===false => read-only, zero saveSettings calls, saveState stays 'idle', no indicator. EXTEND the debounced effect guard to short-circuit when canSave is false (the hook NEVER re-derives authorization - it consumes the injected canSave that the parent computes from useRbac()/disableSave per ADR-001). No new authorization surface. CRITICAL: no inline unstable useEffect dep. Strict TS no any; immutable; <=2 nesting, early return when !canSave. Biome clean; pnpm build clean. RED handoff: un-skip only this it; confirm RED-for-right-reason; refactor commit separate.

steps.name: Stale-guard: only the latest value persists when edits arrive in rapid succession
criteria: Three rapid edits within one debounce window collapse to a single save
The single save carries the LAST value (monotonic requestSeq stale-guard - an earlier in-flight response never overwrites a fresher one)
@US-01 hook scenario 'persists only the latest value when edits arrive in rapid succession' is un-skipped and green
steps.scenario_name: @US-01 @error persists only the latest value when edits arrive in rapid succession
steps.implementation_notes: EXEMPT FROM PARADIGM: TS-row + Vitest renderHook with vi.useFakeTimers + vi.advanceTimersByTime(300); single-example. Invariant (b) of the machine (ADR-029): only the latest sequence's response is applied. EXTEND useModifySettings with a monotonic requestSeqRef incremented on each save dispatch; rapid edits re-arm the single debounce timer (so only one save fires) AND each in-flight save captures its seq so a stale resolution is discarded - mirrors the shipped TeamForecastView requestSeqRef stale-guard (D-SA-MACHINE / D-REUSE-SHIPPED-PATTERN). Assert saveSettings called once with the last value. CRITICAL: requestSeqRef is a useRef (stable), not a state dep; no inline unstable useEffect dep (project_react185). Strict TS no any; immutable; <=2 nesting. Biome clean; pnpm build clean. RED handoff: un-skip only this it; confirm RED-for-right-reason; refactor commit separate.

steps.name: No-save-on-mount: initial page load fires no save
criteria: Rendering the hook and advancing past two debounce windows with no user edit fires no save
@US-01 hook scenario 'does not fire any save on the initial page load' is un-skipped and green (the scaffold already satisfies the no-op-on-mount guarantee; keep it green)
steps.scenario_name: @US-01 does not fire any save on the initial page load
steps.implementation_notes: EXEMPT FROM PARADIGM: TS-row + Vitest renderHook; single-example. Guardrail: no run/save on mount (the dirty/hasInteracted flag from 01-01 must start false so the initial getSettings hydration does NOT count as a user edit). DISTILL notes the inert scaffold already passes the no-save-on-mount dry-run; this cycle keeps it green after the machine is live - the risk is that hydrating settings into state could trip the dirty flag, so assert it does not. EXTEND useModifySettings only if the hasInteracted flag needs explicit guarding against the load hydration. CRITICAL: no inline unstable useEffect dep. Strict TS no any; immutable; <=2 nesting. Biome clean; pnpm build clean. RED handoff: confirm GREEN-for-right-reason (no save across 2x debounce) - if it was already green from 01-01, this is a confirmation + commit cycle, not new production code; refactor commit separate.

steps.name: Real SaveStateIndicator + wire into ModifyTeamSettings (remove Save button, RBAC parity via disableSave -> canSave)
criteria: SaveStateIndicator renders the passive status copy per saveState: 'Saving...' / 'All changes saved' (OQ-1 locked) / 'Couldn't save - Retry' (Retry invokes the passed retry handler) / 'Reloading...'; nothing rendered when canSave is false (read-only parity)

ModifyTeamSettings opts useModifySettings into autoSave (passing disableSave -> canSave), removes the ValidationActions onSave block (lines 250-255) and renders SaveStateIndicator in its place; the inline validationError Alert (230-244) is retained as the primary error channel
No Save button is rendered on the general team settings surface; ValidationActions remains untouched for its other callers
pnpm build clean (tsc -b + vite build); Biome zero warnings on ./src; existing ModifyTeamSettings tests green
steps.scenario_name: @US-01 reports calm progress: idle, then saving, then all-changes-saved
steps.implementation_notes: EXEMPT FROM PARADIGM: TS-row + Vitest/RTL; single-example component render assertions, not quantified invariants. This step has its OWN component-level RED scenario - author a SaveStateIndicator.test.tsx (colocated, mirrors the project's component-test style) driving each saveState -> rendered copy + Retry click; the autosave hook scenario referenced is the integration anchor already green from 01-02 (this step does not re-own it, it wires the indicator the user sees). Copy strings: 'Saving...', 'All changes saved' (OQ-1 RESOLVED, locked - use verbatim across all four settings surfaces), 'Couldn't save - Retry' (Retry button calls the retry() from the hook), 'Reloading...' (used by Slice 2). Render nothing when canSave is false (RBAC parity - no indicator for a viewer). EXTEND ModifyTeamSettings.tsx: opt into autoSave passing disableSave (line 253) -> canSave; REPLACE the ValidationActions onSave block (250-255) with SaveStateIndicator; KEEP the inline validationError Alert (230-244). Use MUI for the indicator visuals (no new dependency). Skip framework renders-without-crashing tests (CLAUDE.md) - assert the status copy + Retry behaviour, real business behaviour. CI-LEARNINGS PRE-APPLY: Biome zero-warnings is the prebuild hook; grep docs/ci-learnings.md for TS/Biome families before editing. Strict TS no any; immutable; <=2 nesting. No comments. Biome clean; pnpm build clean. RED handoff: write the SaveStateIndicator.test.tsx RED first (scaffold throws) -> implement -> GREEN; refactor commit separate.

steps.name: Walking skeleton (real-io): a valid team-settings edit persists with 'All changes saved' and no Save button
criteria: The @walking_skeleton @real-io @US-01 test.fixme in AutoSaveTeamSettings.spec.ts is un-fixme'd and runs in the E2E suite

Driving demo scenario 0 (Team Zenith): open team detail -> edit team -> set Throughput History -> the 'All changes saved' indicator appears -> no Save button present -> after page reload the value persists
All element access stays in the TeamEditPage POM (setThroughputHistory / waitForChangesSaved / hasSaveButton / getThroughputHistory); no inline page.locator
The scenario was RUN against a locally-started app loaded with demo scenario 0 before commit and passes
steps.scenario_name: @walking_skeleton @real-io @US-01 a team-admin's valid settings edit persists with All changes saved and no Save button
steps.implementation_notes: EXEMPT FROM PARADIGM: E2E walking-skeleton (single-shot real-io UI flow over the production app); the mandate keeps E2E single-example - they verify wiring, not invariants. The save-machine invariants live in the 01-01..07 hook unit tests (faster, deterministic). The spec + POM are already authored test.fixme; this is the ONE Playwright WS (user-confirmed one WS only), proving the full real-io loop on the linchpin surface (general team settings). USER/AGENT RUNS LIVE per project memory (feedback_e2e_run_locally_by_user: Claude runs the live Playwright itself - creds in env, do NOT punt to the user; feedback_run_playwright_before_commit: never commit a spec/POM not RUN against a locally-started app - pnpm build only type-checks locators, not validity; feedback_e2e_page_object_model: POM-only, no inline page.locator; feedback_e2e_use_demo_data: drive from seeded demo data via loadDemoScenario(0) + waitForBackgroundUpdates, never live connector syncs). Add/confirm the TeamEditPage POM methods setThroughputHistory / waitForChangesSaved / hasSaveButton / getThroughputHistory match the real accessible names/testids 01-08 shipped (the indicator copy 'All changes saved'). CI-LEARNINGS PRE-APPLY: Playwright getByRole({name}) is case-insensitive substring - pass exact:true for single-verb labels (2026-05-16); a POM action that triggers a client-side redirect MUST waitForURL the settled pattern (2026-05-25); for the async-settled indicator use expect.poll / toBeVisible auto-retry, never one-shot expect(await getX()) (2026-05-25). Procedure: un-fixme, start the app locally (dotnet run backend + frontend), load demo scenario 0, run the scenario, confirm green; adjust the POM ONLY if a real accessible name/testid differs. ORCHESTRATOR NOTE: REQUIRES A RUNNING APP - cannot be self-certified from a type-check; the agent runs the live Playwright and reports the live-run result. Biome/lint clean on the E2E project.

phases.name: Forecast filter auto-save + one-click reload (US-03, premium)
phases.description: Slice 3 (depends on Slice 1 mechanism). Forecast filter rule auto-save reusing the linchpin machine, the real ReloadDependentDataAction one-click 'Reload throughput now' (the expensive recompute NEVER auto-fires, OQ-2 locked), removal of the forecast-filter-takeeffect-hint Alert, premium + isTeamAdmin gating preserved via injected canSave. Settings track order: runs after Slice 1. No API/DTO change.

(2) EXTEND StateMappingsEditor.tsx: DELETE the 'must reload' Alert (109-111) - retires KPI-2 stopgap #2; on 'saved' run the silent auto-refresh (cheap) and, if it fails, render the REUSED ReloadDependentDataAction (built in 03-04) as the one-click fallback (D-RELOAD: never 'go elsewhere and refresh'). Keep inline mapping validation errors. The refresh path is the existing teamMetrics re-fetch (no new adapter). CRITICAL: no inline unstable useEffect dep; stabilise the additionalFetch + reload callbacks (project_react185). CI-LEARNINGS PRE-APPLY: grep ci-learnings TS/Biome families.
